name: skeleton-card
visual_summary: A skeleton card is a loading state UI component that mimics the appearance of a card. It displays a placeholder content, giving users a visual cue that the data is being fetched or processed. Use a skeleton card to indicate loading or delayed content in your applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: skeleton-card
Description: A skeleton card is a loading state UI component that mimics the appearance of a card. It displays a placeholder content, giving users a visual cue that the data is being fetched or processed. Use a skeleton card to indicate loading or delayed content in your applications.
Style: minimal, light
Interactions: animate on load, static
Tags: loading state, feedback, ux, ui components, loading animation, placeholders

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
